subcodes.first_line: O my God! By what remembrance can I remember Thee, knowing that remembrance itself hath no mention before the manifestations of the lights of Thy grandeur [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فیا الهی بای ذکر اذکرک بعد علمی بان الذکر غیر مذکور عند ظهورات انوار عظمتک و
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @impossibility of true worship of God, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
